freshness_policy.max_allowed_age_description: Policy-aware multi-section snapshot for baseline or simulation state.
Canonical holdings and cash state for an as-of date.
Deterministically ordered transaction and income ledger window.
Core-derived daily net cashflow projection for operational liquidity planning.
Position-level analytics input with valuation and cash-flow provenance.
Portfolio-level valuation and cash-flow input for TWR/MWR workflows.
Portfolio reference context for analytics sourcing and lifecycle bounds.
Analytics-safe market-data window with observed and ingested timestamp lineage.
Instrument, issuer, taxonomy, and classification source reference.
Effective benchmark assignment for a portfolio and as-of date.
Effective benchmark constituent and weight segments across a requested window.
Canonical index price and return source series.
Canonical risk-free rate source series for excess-return workflows.
Consumer-safe reconciliation run, finding, break, and blocking evidence.
Completeness, freshness, and blocking coverage report for source products.
Source-batch, validation, replay, DLQ, quarantine, and repair evidence.
Approved DPM model target weights, bands, and cash reserve policy.
DPM mandate, model, policy, jurisdiction, and rebalance constraints.
DPM instrument shelf, restriction, liquidity, and settlement eligibility.
DPM tax-lot and cost-basis state for tax-aware sells.
DPM observed transaction-fee evidence for proof-pack cost supportability.
DPM price and FX coverage diagnostics for target-universe valuation.
DPM source-family readiness is evaluated on demand for the requested as-of date.
PM-book membership is resolved on demand from current portfolio master state for the requested as-of date.
CIO model-change cohorts are resolved on demand from the approved model definition and effective discretionary mandate bindings for the requested as-of date.
Client restriction profiles are effective-dated source records resolved by portfolio, client, mandate, and as-of date.
Sustainability preference profiles are effective-dated source records resolved by portfolio, client, mandate, framework, and as-of date.
